title: elymus engelmannii
intro: Elymus engelmannii, also known as Engelmann's wildrye or blue wildrye, is a type of perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Elymus engelmannii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Elymus engelmannii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
